name: EZEPTOCORE
description: Algorithmic breakbeat sampler and sample mangler. Streams SD-card audio, re-slices it in real time, and layers 16 effects around an internal rungler sequencer, clock division and sample-analysis triggers.

controls.name: AMEN
controls.description: Sets the looping random-sequencer pattern that evolves slice order and break movement.

controls.name: BREAK
controls.description: Scales the break-mangling side of the engine, shaping how aggressively the sample is reworked.
controls.detail: links to slice timing and FX behavior

controls.name: EFFECTS
controls.description: Selects the current effect preset and intensity for the sample-mangling chain.

inputs.name: Clock In
inputs.description: Syncs the internal sequencer and timebase.

inputs.name: FX Intensity CV
inputs.description: Modulates the strength of the selected effect preset.

outputs.name: Audio Out
outputs.description: Processed sample output from the internal SD streamer and FX chain.

outputs.name: Clock Out
outputs.description: Mirrors the master clock with built-in division and multiplication.

outputs.name: Trigger Out
outputs.description: Analysis-derived trigger output for slice accents and rhythmic extraction.

behaviors.name: Rungler breaks
behaviors.description: The internal looping random sequencer generates evolving slice patterns instead of a fixed step order.

behaviors.name: Real-time slicing
behaviors.description: Samples stream directly from SD storage and can be chopped, sliced and transformed without preloading into a fixed program.

behaviors.name: Tempo compensation
behaviors.description: The engine keeps sample playback pitched in time when the master clock changes, so breaks stay locked to tempo.

behaviors.name: Preset FX stack
behaviors.description: Sixteen onboard effects are selected through curated presets, with the BREAK control shaping how hard the module leans into them.

behaviors.name: Analysis triggers
behaviors.description: Kick, snare and transient analysis can produce trigger outs that follow the loop's rhythmic structure.

patchIdeas.name: Amen break mangler
patchIdeas.patch: Load a breakbeat · clock it from the rack master clock · use AMEN for evolving slice order · BREAK for more violent reshaping · monitor Audio Out for a constantly mutating breakcore loop.
patchIdeas.diagram:
EZEPTOCORE:
* AMEN: noon
* BREAK: 1 o'clock
* EFFECTS: 11 o'clock

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> EZEPTOCORE (Clock In)
- EZEPTOCORE (Audio Out) -> Output (In)
- EZEPTOCORE (Clock Out) c> Clock Divider (In)

patchIdeas.name: Bank-hopped drum rack
patchIdeas.patch: CV-scan the 16 sample banks while the master clock runs · each bank swap changes the loop character from drum kit to glitch bed · use Trigger Out to clock a companion envelope or drum voice.
patchIdeas.diagram:
EZEPTOCORE:
* AMEN: slow
* EFFECTS: low

Sequencer:
Envelope:
Output:

- Sequencer (CV) >> EZEPTOCORE (Sample Select CV)
- Clock (Out) c> EZEPTOCORE (Clock In)
- EZEPTOCORE (Trigger Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- EZEPTOCORE (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: FX-smeared stutter
patchIdeas.patch: Push BREAK and rotate EFFECTS to lean into time-stretch, tape stop and beat-repeat behavior · use a short break loop as source material · the result lands between sample slicing and live DJ destruction.
patchIdeas.diagram:
EZEPTOCORE:
* BREAK: max
* EFFECTS: 2 o'clock

Mixer:
Output:

- Mixer (Out) -> EZEPTOCORE (Audio In)
- Clock (Out) c> EZEPTOCORE (Clock In)
- EZEPTOCORE (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Triggered slice accents
patchIdeas.patch: Use Trigger Out for slice-derived accents · patch the trigger to an envelope and VCA · the module's analysis engine turns dense sample edits into rhythmic side-chains for a drum bus.
patchIdeas.diagram:
EZEPTOCORE:
* AMEN: 2 o'clock

Envelope:
VCA:
Drum Loop:
Output:

- Drum Loop (Out) -> EZEPTOCORE (Audio In)
- EZEPTOCORE (Trigger Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- EZEPTOCORE (Audio Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)
